title: Carfume Limited Edition Winter Angel Car Air Freshener | Premium Bubblegum, Vanilla & Cotton Candy Fragrance | Luxury Recyclable Scented Diffuser - Odour Eliminator - UK Made Car Accessories
features: Luxury car fragrance in a hand-crafted diffuser: Elevate your drive with a premium car scent housed in a beautiful recyclable glass diffuser. A stylish eco-conscious luxury car fragrance.
Mood‑enhancing aroma: This car perfume channels an enchanting blend of bubblegum and cotton candy-like notes with a frosty freshness that evokes winter's magic.
Long‑lasting car air freshener: Designed to go the distance—this car freshener provides up to 6 weeks of persistent car air freshener scent, ensuring your vehicle feels constantly refreshed.
Odour‑neutralising car deodoriser: Beyond masking smells, this car deodoriser actively neutralises lingering odours, leaving a clean car smell rather than just a surface-level freshener.

Perfect gift for automotive enthusiasts: This women's car freshener makes the ideal present for car lovers. Compatible with any car, it’s a premium accessory that blends form, function, and fragrance.
description: Product description The Carfume Winter Angel Car Air Freshener is a standout addition to your collection of premium car accessories, offering a perfume-inspired luxury fragrance that transforms every drive into a sensory experience. Featuring an enchanting bubblegum blend of cotton candy, this high-end scent delivers a rich, cosmic aroma that lingers for up to six weeks. Housed in a beautifully designed glass bottle with a carved wooden lid, it’s not just a car air freshener, but a statement piece that enhances your vehicle’s interior. Easy to use—just remove the cork and shake to activate—this diffuser combines elegant style with lasting performance. Made in the UK using recyclable, eco-conscious materials, the Winter Angel fragrance is ideal for drivers who value both sustainability and sophistication. Whether you're elevating your daily commute or upgrading your car accessories game, this luxurious air freshener offers an unforgettable fragrance journey inspired by high-end perfumes.Our Story: Carfume was born in 2019 with a vision to enhance our customer’s adventures wherever the road takes them. Set the mood - pick a route, prepare your playlist and choose a premium air freshener or purifier that'll guarantee you Drive HappySafety WarningAvoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. Ingredients Concentrated Oil Car Air Freshener - Winter Angel Fragrance
